name: Wasteland War-Raptor
reasoning: V2 best captures the prompt's core requirements: a muscular lion-headed humanoid in full sprint alongside a dust-colored raptor with slate-grey striping, both charging forward with weapons raised through a barren wasteland. The composition is dynamic and tilted, with excellent warm fire-tones and high contrast. V1 has a less threatening lion character and weaker overall kinetic energy. V3 includes an extraneous background figure that wasn't requested and dilutes focus from the main pair.

artifacts_found.issue: Unnecessary background figure (humanoid with spear) distracts from the main composition and wasn't in the prompt
